selector-class-pattern.message: Class names must be kebab-case BEM: block, block__element, or block--modifier.

color-no-hex.message: Raw hex colors are not allowed. Use a design token (var(--token)) from src/styles/tokens.css, or color-mix() over a token.

function-disallowed-list.message: Raw color functions are not allowed. Use a design token (var(--token)) from src/styles/tokens.css, or color-mix() over a token.
